## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style (`npm run lint` passes)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective (`npm test` passes)
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (README, env vars, etc.)
- [ ] I have added environment variables to `.env.example` if applicable

## How Has This Been Tested?

Please describe the tests you ran to verify your changes.
